t: Bringing Photos picker to your SwiftUI app
a: Select media assets by using a Photos picker view that SwiftUI provides.
Help users organize their photos into albums and browse photo collections in a grid-based layout using PhotoKit.
Provide custom functionality in the Photos app by bundling an app extension.

t: Creating a Slideshow Project Extension for Photos
a: Augment the macOS Photos app with extensions that support project creation.

t: Delivering an Enhanced Privacy Experience in Your Photos App
a: Adopt the latest privacy enhancements to deliver advanced user-privacy controls.
Provide the same interactive playback of Live Photos as in the iOS Photos app.
Get assets, asset collections, and collection lists matching a specified query.
Embed a system-provided, half-height Photos picker into your app’s view.

t: Loading and Caching Assets and Thumbnails
a: Request image, video, or Live Photos content, and cache for quick reuse.

t: Observing Changes in the Photo Library
a: Register an observer to be notified of changes to the photo library.
Work with image and video assets that the Photos app manages, including those from iCloud Photos and Live Photos.

t: Selecting Photos and Videos in iOS
a: Improve the user experience of finding and selecting assets by using the Photos picker.
